ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set true to always open new pane even if the daily note is already opened, otherwise the plugin will try to find the existing daily note and focus on it
ast.target: 设置为 true 以始终在新窗格中打开，即使每日笔记已打开，否则插件将尝试查找已存在的每日笔记并聚焦于它

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Daily notes new pane plugin adds support for colorizing today's periodic note, this functionality relies on another plugin called "Style Settings", please install and enable it so that you can adjust background colors for periodic notes
ast.target: 每日笔记新窗格插件增加了为今日周期性笔记着色的支持，此功能依赖于另一个名为“样式设置”的插件，请安装并启用它以便您可以调整周期性笔记的背景颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the prefix for lines added via "Append Line" command, only one template syntax is supported, which is "{{DATE:$FORMAT}}", the "$FORMAT" must be a Moment.js format, e.g. HH:mm
ast.target: 设置通过“追加行”命令添加的行的前缀，仅支持一种模板语法，即“{{DATE:$FORMAT}}”，其中“$FORMAT”必须是 Moment.js 格式，例如 HH:mm

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, the new line will be appended to the content of target header.
ast.target: 如果设置，新行将被追加到目标标题的内容中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable customize background color for daily notes in Style Settings
ast.target: 在样式设置中启用自定义每日笔记背景颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable customize background color for weekly notes in Style Settings
ast.target: 在样式设置中启用自定义每周笔记背景颜色

ast.name: description
ast.source: Easily open daily/periodic notes in new pane, and much more!
ast.target: 轻松在新窗格中打开每日/周期性笔记，以及更多功能！
